title: MY NEIGHBOR - 211info
text: THE CONTINGENT MY NEIGHBOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects goods and services from community members to families and youth impacted by foster care. 809 N Russell Street #203 Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: -Resource families and foster children/youth -Biological families and relative providers with an open ODHS Child Welfare case Hours: No standard hours Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Contact the caseworker to make a request FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Baby Clothing * Foster Children Bedding/Linen * Foster Children Children's Clothing * Foster Children Diapers * Foster Children Donation Drop Off Points * Foster Children Formula/Baby Food * Foster Children Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - EVERY CHILD OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - EVERY CHILD PDX If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE CONTINGENT
